pi_items.source: setup_task.sh: PORT=8000, TCPServer(("", PORT)), curl verification at line 107, Edge launch at line 114-120
setup_task.sh line 48: if "MSIE" in user_agent or "Trident" in user_agent, export_result.sh line 40: grep -qE "MSIE|Trident", task description mentions both

privileged_info_summary: The task implements a synthetic legacy portal server running on localhost:8000 that requires Internet Explorer User-Agent spoofing. The agent must spoof their browser's User-Agent to contain either 'MSIE' or 'Trident' substrings to access the portal. The portal displays a randomly generated manifest code in format MFST-<4-digit-random>-<4-digit-timestamp>, which the agent must save to /home/ga/Desktop/manifest_code.txt. All metadata values (portal_url, output_file, and required_ua_substrings) are correctly specified and match the actual task implementation.
